positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical cosmic fox silhouette surrounded by nebulae dust and crystalline constellations. The fox is captured mid-leap, embodying graceful energy. The background features deep sapphire blues, iridescent purples, and accents of brilliant gold and teal, creating a dramatic cosmic gradient. Composition should utilize clean lines and strong negative space, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic, maximalist depth, ethereal, detailed vector art style, high contrast, clean silhouettes, full body centered composition. Volumetric lighting, crisp edges.
